author: jaydenpiao
name: SP8192 + Legal TTT 4ep + KV Lowbit Size Clear
blurb: Size-clearing fallback built from PR #1812: SP8192 3-layer recurrence stack with Brotli lgwin=24, 32K score-first TTT chunks, and int5 GPTQ only for final-block attention K/V matrices. Two completed 8xH100 seeds.
technique_summary: Built from PR #1812 with Brotli lgwin=24, TTT_CHUNK_TOKENS=32768, and LOWBIT_LAYERS=blocks.10.attn.c_k.weight:5,blocks.10.attn.c_v.weight:5.

attribution.this_record_delta: Brotli lgwin=24, 32K TTT chunks, and final-block attention K/V int5 lowbit GPTQ to clear size with extra artifact margin.
attribution.status: Two completed full 8xH100 seeds, reported as a two-seed fallback candidate rather than a SOTA claim.
